creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From comment #0: 

> … partly wrong, …

The more that I begin to look at this chapter, the more that it seems wrong for DRM KMS kld_list -related blurb to appear under X.Org configuration. 

(I assume that i915kms, radeonkms, and amdgpu under what's currently 5.4.5 relate to the same three words under <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Graphics#drm-kmod>.)

kld_list is an aspect of rc.conf(5), not to be confused with X.Org configuration. 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=rc.conf&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD>
